body.title: CLOSED: NE stuck 5+ consecutive cycles → trigger dreaming pass directly (LIDA DMN analog)
body.result: dreaming.run() triggered at _ne_stuck_count==5, counter reset; LIDA DMN analog in _ne_worker()
body.description:
LIDA's Default Mode Network analog: when no immediate task is actionable, switch to synthesis mode rather than continuing to idle. Igor's dreaming module exists but fires only on IGOR_DREAMING_INTERVAL cycle counter. A stuck NE is idle compute; dreaming can surface new content and synthesis.

In coa.py _ne_worker(), reuse the consecutive-no-result counter added by T-igor-ne-impasse-handler. When counter reaches 5, call dreaming.run() directly. Reset counter after dreaming fires. This ensures stuck Igor shifts to synthesis mode rather than waiting for the counter-based interval.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding (MEDIUM inertia)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: conditional dreaming.run() call at counter==5 in _ne_worker(). Out of scope: changes to dreaming module internals.
**Test plan:** With NE stuck for 5 cycles, dreaming.log shows a dreaming pass triggered at that cycle rather than waiting for IGOR_DREAMING_INTERVAL. Counter resets after dreaming fires.
